name: Tar Heel Hush Puppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the buttermilk, cornmeal, salt, baking soda, and sugar together until well combined.
2. Gradually add water to the mixture, stirring constantly, until you achieve a thick batter consistency.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the batter into deep fat that is heated to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Cook the hush puppies until golden brown.
5. Serves 6. Piedmont Region, North Carolina, USA
